daily_summary.headline: Aurora and SpaceX Starlink Launches Dominate the Day

top_events.title: Strong Aurora Activity
top_events.description: A G2-level geomagnetic storm is expected, providing excellent aurora viewing opportunities for those at higher latitudes.
top_events.action: Check local conditions and prepare for aurora viewing.

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Starlink Group 10-33 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX is launching another batch of Starlink satellites, continuing to expand their global internet coverage.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream of the launch.

top_events.title: Electron 'Eight Days A Week' Launch
top_events.description: Rocket Lab's Electron rocket will launch the StriX satellite, contributing to Earth observation capabilities.
top_events.action: Follow updates on the launch schedule.

alerts.title: Strong Aurora Activity Expected
alerts.message: A G2-level geomagnetic storm is forecasted for March 19, providing excellent aurora viewing opportunities for those at higher latitudes.
alerts.action_required: Check local conditions and prepare for aurora viewing.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.

Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
